title: 40,000 Horsemen
writer: Elsa Chauvel, Charles Chauvel, E.V. Timms
actors: Grant Taylor, Betty Bryant, Chips Rafferty
plot: Three young Australians join the army at the beginning of World War I and are assigned to the Australian Light Horse cavalry, which is serving in Palestine. The three eventually take part in the attack during the Battle of Beershe...
